body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 

* Removes the SciML and DiffEq dependency and the related backward compatibility code
* This is a breaking changes; however, the downstream consumers should have been updated to no longer need the backward compatibility code
* Will release v1.0 after we have established what to do about redundant cache computation


## To-do

- Proposed task
-->

In the Content, I have included

- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

title: Remove SciML/DiffEq dependency
